summary: Comprehensive testing of the new Labour RAB approval workflow (backend + frontend). Backend pytest baseline (2/2) plus 7 new extended tests (QC reject, Planning reject, Accountant reject, Payment Schedule auto-link, role permissions, sequential RAB numbering) all PASS (9/9). Frontend: QC Dashboard renders, PM Dashboard Labour RAB tab works, Planning labour_payments queue uses RABApprovalQueue (rab-queue-planning testid present), SE V2 stage dialog has Request RAB sub-tab with all three required testids. 'Request Advance' confirmed removed from SE labour stage flow.

minor.issue: Spec/agent context suggests this URL pattern, but the actual implementation uses /api/projects/{pid}/work-orders/{wo_id}/stages/{stage_id}/payment-requests/{rid}/accountant-reject. Documentation/spec mismatch only — endpoint is functional.

design_issues.screen: Site Engineer Project Detail (DLR & DPR list)
issues: React warning 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' from ProjectDLRDPRList. Non-blocking but should be addressed (missing key= on map).

action_items: Optional: align documentation/spec — the Accountant reject endpoint lives under /api/projects/{pid}/work-orders/{wo_id}/stages/{stage_id}/payment-requests/{rid}/accountant-reject, NOT under /api/accountant/labour-payments/{rid}/accountant-reject. Either update docs or add an alias under /accountant/ for parity with /release.
Fix missing React key prop in ProjectDLRDPRList render (low priority).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend RAB chain endpoints are correctly enforcing role guards (planning rejected from pm-approve with 403; accountant rejected from qc-approve with 403).
Payment Schedule auto-link on Accountant release verified: a payment_stages row with kind='labour_rab', is_locked=true, status='paid', rab_request_id set is created.
Sequential RAB numbering is per-WO and zero-padded (RAB-01, RAB-02 …), increments correctly across rejections/resubmits.
Status transitions verified: requested → pm_approved → qc_approved → planning_approved → approved (release). Reject paths verified: QC→PM, Planning→QC, Accountant→Planning.
test_credentials: Used admin@constructionos.com, planning@constructionos.com, accountant@constructionos.com, engineer@constructionos.com (all /Demo@1234) as documented.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created; tests submitted multiple RAB requests (RAB-08 through RAB-14 approximately on the Plinth Mason Work stage of proj_f66ab2fcaa58). Several rejection-state RABs and one fully-released RAB with auto-linked payment_stage are now present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend route file: /app/backend/routes/projects.py. RAB reject helpers all live under /projects/{pid}/work-orders/{wo_id}/stages/{stage_id}/payment-requests/{rid}/<role>-(approve|reject). Release endpoint is /accountant/labour-payments/{rid}/release. SE V2 dialog is rendered by SiteEngineerWorkOrdersV2.jsx; tabs become visible after a stage's 'View' button is clicked from the contractor drill-in screen, NOT directly from project detail tabs.
rca of the issue: N/A — all critical paths working as specified.
